lunar.description: Paush Amavasya — The new moon marking the spiritual end of the waning phase of Paush month.
Paush Shukla Ashtami — Fasting and worship day in the waxing phase.
Paush Purnima — Shakambhari Purnima. A day of charity, holy bathing, and spiritual merit.
Magh Krishna Ashtami — Devotional fasting in the waning phase.
Annular Solar Eclipse — An unusually long 'Ring of Fire' solar eclipse visible from parts of the Southern Hemisphere.
Mauni Amavasya — An auspicious new moon of Magh month observed with silence, meditation, and holy dips.
Magh Shukla Ashtami — Bhishma Ashtami.
Penumbral Lunar Eclipse — Visible across Asia, India, Europe, and the Americas as the moon passes Earth's penumbra.
Magh Purnima — Associated with spiritual bathing at the Triveni Sangam and Guru Ravidas Jayanti.
Phalguna Krishna Ashtami — Janmashtami tithi alignment in the waning fortnight.
Phalguna Amavasya — New moon marking the transition into the Hindu seasonal cycle.
Phalguna Shukla Ashtami — Devotional observances.
Phalguna Purnima — Holi Purnima, celebrated with the festival of colors.
Chaitra Krishna Ashtami — Waning phase devotion.
Chaitra Amavasya — Gudi Padwa Eve / Shuni Amavasya.
Chaitra Shukla Ashtami — Durga Ashtami / Ram Navami eve.
Chaitra Purnima — Hanuman Jayanti.
Vaishakha Krishna Ashtami.
Vaishakha Amavasya — Holy bathing day.
Vaishakha Shukla Ashtami.
Vaishakha Purnima — Buddha Purnima / Vesak. Seasonal Blue Moon.
Jyeshtha Krishna Ashtami.
Jyeshtha Amavasya — Shani Jayanti / Vat Savitri Amavasya.
Jyeshtha Shukla Ashtami.
Jyeshtha Purnima — Vat Purnima / Kabeer Jayanti.
Ashadha Krishna Ashtami.
Ashadha Amavasya — Ashadhi Ekadashi lunar period alignment.
Ashadha Shukla Ashtami.
Penumbral Lunar Eclipse — Earth's faint shadow partially darkens the lunar surface.
Ashadha Purnima — Guru Purnima / Vyasa Purnima.
Shravana Krishna Ashtami.
Total Solar Eclipse — A major total eclipse of the sun visible from southern Europe, North Africa, and the Middle East.
Shravana Amavasya — Gatari Amavasya / Hariyali Amavasya.
Shravana Shukla Ashtami.
Penumbral Lunar Eclipse — Third lunar eclipse of the year.
Shravana Purnima — Raksha Bandhan / Narali Purnima.
Krishna Janmashtami — Auspicious birth anniversary of Lord Krishna.
Bhadrapada Amavasya — Pithori Amavasya.
Bhadrapada Shukla Ashtami — Radha Ashtami.
Bhadrapada Purnima — Start of Pitru Paksha (Shradh).
Ashwin Krishna Ashtami.
Ashwin Amavasya — Sarva Pitru Amavasya / Mahalaya.
Ashwin Shukla Ashtami — Maha Ashtami Durga Puja.
Ashwin Purnima — Kojagiri Purnima / Sharad Purnima.
Kartik Krishna Ashtami — Karwa Chauth / Ahoi Ashtami period.
Kartik Amavasya — Laxmi Puja / Diwali Festival of Lights.
Kartik Shukla Ashtami — Gopashtami.
Kartik Purnima — Tripurari Purnima / Dev Diwali.
Margashirsha Krishna Ashtami.
Margashirsha Amavasya.
Margashirsha Shukla Ashtami.
Margashirsha Purnima — Datta Jayanti.
Paush Krishna Ashtami.
Paush Amavasya — Year-end new moon phase.
